items.title: Regularly $180 Razer BlackWidow V3 Hyperspeed Mini wireless keyboard is down to its lowest price at $58.50
items.summary:
As part of a wider Razer sale event at Woot, you can now grab the BlackWidow V3 Mini Hyperspeed wireless gaming keyboard for $58.49 Prime shipped (a $6 delivery fee will apply otherwise) with a 10% discount that auto-applies during checkout. Originally $200, this particular variant of this board with the brand’s Green tactile switches has been going for $180 lately at Amazon. That means you’re looking at over $121 in savings today, marking the lowest price we have tracked for this keyboard to date. We saw the Phantom Edition variant of this keyboard with pudding keycaps go for $80 earlier this year, but today’s offer beats that to make this a great time to cash in. Head below for more details.

The Ministry of Domestic Trade and Cost of Living (KPDN) says it is strengthening enforcement of the subsidised RON95 petrol under the BUDI95 initiative. The move is aimed at preventing misuse and fuel leakages nationwide. KPDN enforcement director-general Azman Adam said the ministry is adopting a more intelligence-led approach to enforcement to ensure that subsidies […]

Microsoft and the newly appointed head of Xbox have already confirmed Project Helix is well into development and that it will indeed be able to play both Xbox and PC games. What that means exactly is still unclear, but we do have new details directly from Xbox on everything from a hint at the release window, the machine’s dual-functionality, and even some actual specs here today.
